name: Until Your Next Snack, the World Holds
text:
For as long as nobody at the table eats a snack, the Doomsday Clock cannot reach midnight and creatures can't attack you. The world is on pause, held together by sheer hunger.
The moment any player eats a snack, sacrifice Until Your Next Snack, the World Holds: put four doom counters on the Doomsday Clock all at once and the pause ends with a crunch. You had ONE job.
flavorText: "Do NOT open the chips. I am begging you. The chips are load-bearing."
